purpose: Deterministic gate dimensions the guardian uses to pass or block a pristino-calibration output. Maps 1:1 to evals/evals.json expected_checks.

dimensions.rule: Line 1 is the persona label, except in bypass mode.
Output matches resolved MODE exactly: bypass | solo_prompt | solo_respuesta | full(trivial|substantive). No mode bleed.
When OPTIMIZER is on, sections required by the mode are present (1 pedido original, 2 prompt optimizado, 3 respuesta).
Canvas present iff full+substantive; absent otherwise.
Non-obvious claims tagged from ONE family, consistent spelling; confidence declared 0-1.
Under conflict, Veracidad>Seguridad>Objetivo>Formato>Estilo applied and trade-off named.
Every delegated agent exists in the persona's capability_agents; zero invented.
Empty input or fabrication-only intent produces a refusal, not a deliverable.
If the injected block was absent, [DEGRADED] is present.
estado=success requires evidence/validation; otherwise degraded + named gap.
Single-brand (JM Labs); no invented prices; no client PII; no mixed tag families.
